overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic industrial urban environment from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077 aesthetic). The camera moves from under an elevated highway past a rocky waterfront area, then along a road and pedestrian walkway beside a massive industrial complex with prominent external piping and a distinctive yellow tower marked '04'.

turning left toward the waterfront canal area

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive elevated highway structure with a rocky wall on the left and a road on the right. A black SUV passes by on the road as the camera moves forward, turning left toward a waterfront area.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a waterfront canal area with greenish water visible between large concrete support pillars. A prominent billboard advertising 'PUMP OVERDRIVE' is visible on the right as the scene opens up from the enclosed underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial road under overpass with massive piping

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right under the overpass, revealing a massive industrial complex with extensive external piping on the right. Several vehicles pass by on the road as a distinctive yellow tower with '04' markings comes into view in the distance.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the pedestrian path next to the industrial complex, passing palm trees and trash bins

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows a steady walk along a pedestrian pathway beside the massive industrial complex. The yellow tower with '04' markings dominates the right side, while palm trees line the left. The camera moves past trash bins and metal guardrails, with the industrial piping and structures remaining prominent throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the oppressive shadow of an elevated highway into a sprawling, sunlit industrial waterfront. It begins beneath the massive concrete structure of the overpass, passing a black SUV on the road before turning left toward a rocky waterfront area. As the camera moves along a canal with greenish water, the enclosed space opens up to reveal a prominent Pump Overdrive billboard and large support pillars. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right, transitioning from the underpass to a wide view of a massive industrial complex characterized by extensive external piping and a distant yellow tower marked 04. Finally, the movement settles into a steady walk along a pedestrian pathway, passing palm trees and metal guardrails while the towering yellow structure dominates the right side of the frame.
